creator: knu@idaemons.org
text:
> >How-To-Repeat:
> Get the port for ImageMagick-5.2.1, do a make, read the error.
> >Fix:
> Update the md5 checksums on the port.

Seems they repacked the distfile yesterday, yet again, to show how
lame their release engineering is.  Sigh.  (FYI, I've confirmed that
the only change in this repack was adding an assert() line)

By the way, I suppose you could temporarily disable MASTER_SORT (your
log indicates you used it, didn't you?) and just try fetching the one
in ${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL}.


Anyway, I'm going to update the port with the repacked distfile
tonight.  Thank you for reporting.

-- 
                           /
                          /__  __       
                         / )  )  ) )  /
Akinori -Aki- MUSHA aka / (_ /  ( (__(  @ idaemons.org / FreeBSD.org

"We're only at home when we're on the run, on the wing, on the fly"
